name: South Dakota Dietitian License
description: Already licensed as a dietitian? Here's whether your license transfers to South Dakota - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.

provider.name: South Dakota Board of Medical and Osteopathic Examiners (SDBMOE)

address.streetAddress:
101 N. Main Ave., Suite 301
Sioux Falls, SD 57104
address.description:
South Dakota Department of Health
Board of Examiners for Dietetic and Nutrition Practice
600 East Capitol Avenue
Pierre, SD 57501-2536

renewalCycle: Every 2 years (expires May 31 of odd years)

requiredDocuments.name: Official Online Application
requiredDocuments.description: Application submitted via the SDBMOE portal.

requiredDocuments.name: CDR Registration Verification
requiredDocuments.description: Proof of active registration with the Commission on Dietetic Registration. Usually submitted directly or verified online by the Board.

fingerprinting.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

mainEntity.name: How much does a South Dakota dietitian license cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: The initial license application fee is $70.

mainEntity.name: When does the South Dakota license need to be renewed?

acceptedAnswer.text: South Dakota dietitian licenses expire biennially on May 31st of odd-numbered years. The renewal fee is $100.

mainEntity.name: Why does South Dakota use the 'Nutritionist' title for Dietitians?

acceptedAnswer.text: South Dakota codified its practice act using the term 'Licensed Nutritionist' for professionals providing medical nutrition therapy, but the requirements parallel those for Registered Dietitians nationally.

mainEntity.name: Does South Dakota have reciprocity for dietitians?

acceptedAnswer.text: South Dakota has enacted the Dietitian Compact, but compact privileges are not yet issuing. For now, dietitians still apply by endorsement through the state board.

mainEntity.name: How long does it take to transfer my dietitian license to South Dakota?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most endorsement applications take 3 to 4 Weeks.

mainEntity.name: Can I start working in South Dakota while my endorsement application is processing?

acceptedAnswer.text: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.
